ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "pop_density" REAL /* Population density of the country (people per square kilometer) */,
  "land_area_kmsq" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pandemic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days since the start of the pandemic */,
  "cum_confirmed" REAL /* Cumulative number of confirmed cases */,
  "cum_confirmed_per_million" REAL /* Cumulative number of confirmed cases per million people */,
  "cum_deaths" REAL /* Cumulative number of deaths */,
  "cum_recovered" REAL /* Cumulative number of recovered cases */,
  "smoothed_cumulative_testing_count" REAL /* Smoothed cumulative count of tests conducted */,
  "smoothed_cum_testing_per_thousand" REAL /* Smoothed cumulative count of tests conducted per thousand people */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the reported data */,
  "data_quality_issues" TEXT /* Description of any data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pandemic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_capacity" (
  "health_capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health capacity entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "health_capacity_score" REAL /* Health capacity score of the country */,
  "health_capacity_score_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the health capacity score */,
  "healthcare_system" TEXT /* Type of healthcare system in the country */,
  "medical_staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of medical staff in the country */,
  "hospital_bed_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospital beds in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_capacity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_rate" (
  "recovery_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of the country */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the recovery rate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the recovery rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_rate_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatality_rate" (
  "fatality_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate of the country */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the fatality rate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the fatality rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatality_rate_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vulnerability" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "vul_hi" REAL /* Vulnerability high index */,
  "vul_1" REAL /* Vulnerability index 1 */,
  "vul_11" REAL /* Vulnerability index 11 */,
  "vul_12" REAL /* Vulnerability index 12 */,
  "vul_13" REAL /* Vulnerability index 13 */,
  "vul_2" REAL /* Vulnerability index 2 */,
  "vul_21" REAL /* Vulnerability index 21 */,
  "vul_22" REAL /* Vulnerability index 22 */,
  "vul_23" REAL /* Vulnerability index 23 */,
  "vul_24" REAL /* Vulnerability index 24 */,
  "vul_3" REAL /* Vulnerability index 3 */,
  "vul_31" REAL /* Vulnerability index 31 */,
  "vul_32" REAL /* Vulnerability index 32 */,
  "vul_33" REAL /* Vulnerability index 33 */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the vulnerability index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the vulnerability index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerability_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loc_c" (
  "loc_c_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local capacity entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "loc_c_hi" REAL /* Local capacity high index */,
  "loc_c_1" REAL /* Local capacity index 1 */,
  "loc_c_11" REAL /* Local capacity index 11 */,
  "loc_c_12" REAL /* Local capacity index 12 */,
  "loc_c_2" REAL /* Local capacity index 2 */,
  "loc_c_22" REAL /* Local capacity index 22 */,
  "loc_c_23" REAL /* Local capacity index 23 */,
  "loc_c_24" REAL /* Local capacity index 24 */,
  "loc_c_3" REAL /* Local capacity index 3 */,
  "loc_c_31" REAL /* Local capacity index 31 */,
  "loc_c_32" REAL /* Local capacity index 32 */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the local capacity index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the local capacity index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loc_c_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loc_c_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_intervals" (
  "population_interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population interval entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population_interval" TEXT /* Population interval of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_intervals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p2p_indices" (
  "p2p_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each P2P index entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "p2p" REAL /* P2P index */,
  "p2p_1" REAL /* P2P index 1 */,
  "p2p_2" REAL /* P2P index 2 */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the P2P index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the P2P index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p2p_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p2p_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_risk" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "inform_covid_risk" REAL /* INFORM COVID-19 risk score */,
  "covid_risk_class" TEXT /* COVID-19 risk class (e.g., Very High, High, Medium, Low) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the COVID-19 risk score */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the COVID-19 risk score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_risk_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file to verify integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file to verify integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Person who made the changes in this version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)
